{{Infobox location
| name = Limit
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Limit Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Limit, also identified as [[Iteration 216]], is a world that underwent a violent merger with the world of [[Harrow]]. This collision resulted in a combined landscape where parts of Limit, such as massive mechanical components, became integrated into the desert terrain of [[Harrow]]. Before this event, Limit was a dying world facing ecological collapse, a mystical plague, and the emergence of insectoid monsters. The population was severely decimated during the merger, leaving only a small fraction of its original billions alive. The world was also home to the [[Terava]], powerful beings that appeared human but were actually natural energy projections. Following its merger with [[Harrow]], Limit was scheduled for demolition.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Limit]] is [[Iteration]] two-sixteen.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Limit]] was scheduled for demolition no later than two standard months ago.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Limit]] is a world that merged with [[Harrow]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Limit]] was a world that contained a piece of a giant machine.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Limit]] was an [[Iteration]] (Two-one-six) that was destined to end.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Abidan]] allowed the world of [[Limit]] to end.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Limit]] was doomed to fall due to a mystical plague and insectoid monsters.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Limit]] is a central planet.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
